creator: robertjenssen@ozemail.com.au
text:
Hi,

I modified source3/configure.in to remove the PIE, PIC and -z,relro options:

      PICFLAG    = 
      LIBS       = -lexecinfo -liconv
      LDFLAGS    = -L/usr/local/lib -L./bin -L/usr/local/lib
      DYNEXP     = -Wl,--export-dynamic
      LDSHFLAGS  = -shared  -L/usr/local/lib -L./bin -L/usr/local/lib
      SHLIBEXT   = so
      SONAMEFLAG = -Wl,-soname,

A replacement for files/patch-source__configure.in is attached. 

I no longer get the .gmon files.

Regards,

Rob Jenssen
